mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (user_id, order_type, order_table, completed) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderType}, #{orderTable}, #{completed})
mapper.select: SELECT o_id, user_id, order_type, order_table, completed, order_time FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o_id DESC

SELECT d.d_id AS id, d.order_id AS orderId, d.product_id AS productId, d.quantity, p.name, p.type, p.price AS unitPrice, (p.price * d.quantity) AS sumPrice, p.img FROM t_order_detail d JOIN t_product p ON d.product_id = p.id WHERE d.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY d.d_id ASC
SELECT o_id, user_id, order_type, order_table, order_time, completed FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o_id DESC
SELECT o_id, user_id, order_type, order_table, order_time, completed FROM t_order ORDER BY o_id DESC
SELECT o_id, user_id, order_type, order_table, order_time, completed FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{id} AND order_time > DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH) ORDER BY o_id DESC
SELECT o_id, user_id, order_type, order_table, order_time, completed FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{id} AND order_time > DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -6 MONTH) ORDER BY o_id DESC
